name: Slip Into Obscurity
description: This model gains the following action:

granted_actions.name: In the Clear
granted_actions.effects: Target gains an Aura (Concealment) token, heals 3, and may be placed within 4". Then, discard this upgrade.

extraction_notes: Action has a special icon '↑' before the action name 'In the Clear', indicating it may be a specific action type marker not standard to the provided list
Limitations section shows '-' indicating no limitations apply to this upgrade
